evals.prompt: I want to research South Boston neighborhoods and housing prices.
evals.expected_output: Two markdown reference docs (neighborhoods + housing prices) with 40+ sources, then a single interactive HTML report with Chart.js charts, Leaflet map, neighborhood cards, and price comparison table. South Boston includes distinct sub-areas (Seaport/Innovation District vs. traditional Southie) so the skill needs to correctly scope neighborhood boundaries.

evals.prompt: Do a full neighborhood & housing analysis for Charlestown, Boston. I want to see which areas have the best value — good neighborhoods relative to price.
evals.expected_output: Two markdown reference docs with 40+ sources, then a single interactive HTML report. Charlestown is a small but distinct Boston neighborhood with both historic townhouses and newer condo developments — the skill should correctly scope to Charlestown and distinguish between property types and price tiers.
